prestazioni: Engine: M10B16 (2002 Turbo's original 1.6L SOHC inline-4) rebuilt with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from BMW Classic for 1,200+ HP potential. Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing and 58mm compressor wheel, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate (set to 28 psi peak boost).

Fuel System: Full sequential port injection with Bosch Motorsport 0280158105 800cc/min injectors (low impedance) and a Pierburg mechanical fuel pump upgraded to 12V with a custom billet aluminum fuel rail. Ignition: MSD 6AL-2 digital ignition box with a Blaster SS coil and NGK R7437-9 racing plugs gapped at 0.024". ECU: Standalone Megasquirt MS3Pro PNP with custom firmware for the M10B16, tuned on a Dynapack hub dyno for 450 WHP on 98 RON race fuel.

Drivetrain: Getrag 245 5-speed dogleg transmission with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) and a 3.45:1 limited-slip differential from a BMW E30 M3 Sport Evolution. Custom 1.25" driveshaft with CV joints from a BMW 325i (E30) to handle increased torque. Cooling: Custom aluminum radiator from CSF Racing with dual 12" SPAL fans and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump, paired with a Setrab 50-row oil cooler and a Mocal thermostatic oil filter sandwich plate.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny-inspired kit (modified for the 2002's chassis) with overfenders extending 3" per side, fabricated from 2x2 twill weave pre-preg carbon. Front splitter: Custom 3D-printed ABS splitter with integrated canards (inspired by the BMW E9 3.0 CSL), adjustable for downforce. Rear wing: Custom 2-piece aluminum wing (similar to the 917/20 "Pink Pig") with 3D-printed endplates and a 12" chord, mounted on billet aluminum pedestals.

Wheels: BBS RS-GT II 16x9 +15 ET front and 16x10 +20 ET rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/45/16 front, 255/40/16 rear). Custom center-lock adapters using Porsche 993 Turbo wheel studs and custom-machined aluminum cones. Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV) with 24-way adjustable damping, custom-valved for the 2002's MacPherson strut front and semi-trailing arm rear. Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115) for the rear trailing arms and subframe mounts.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim with BMW Motorsport-inspired diamond stitching, including Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (H-pattern) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom aluminum dashboard with a 12.3" digital gauge cluster (AEM CD-7) and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede). Roll cage: Custom 8-point chromoly cage (TIG-welded) with integrated harness bars and a removable passenger-side bar for daily usability. Fire suppression: Lifeline Zero 360 system with dual 2.25kg bottles and plumbed nozzles for the engine bay and cabin.
